## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? Keep it concise. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue, for example: Closes #123. For non-trivial changes, open an issue first. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Tests

## Test plan

<!-- List the commands you ran and the result. -->

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused on one topic.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, real PLC IPs, broker URLs, certificates, or local machine paths.
- [ ] I resolved all review conversations.

## Notes for the maintainer

<!-- Anything risky, intentionally deferred, or worth extra review? Especially anything affecting PLC writes, ACLs, or the audit trail. -->
